title: Peloton Interactive (PTON) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Peloton Earnings Calendar and Forecast Data. Full-Year Fiscal 2026 Guidance: Peloton guided total revenue of $2.40-$2.44 billion and Q3 revenue of $605-$625 million. Full-year adjusted EBITDA was raised to $450-$500 million with Q3 adjusted EBITDA of $121-$135 million. Key Performance Highlights: Average net monthly paid Connected Fitness subscription churn was 1.9% in Q2, indicating stronger-than-expected retention. Commercial business unit revenue grew 10% year over year in Q2. Connected Fitness Subscriptions: The company reported specific subscriber metrics at each earnings date, with 3.06 million connected fitness subscriptions at the end of Q3 2024. Profitability Metrics: Adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow are now reported alongside traditional GAAP metrics, reflecting the company's focus on cash generation. Analyst Coverage: Multiple financial platforms provide earnings forecasts and analyst ratings for PTON.
